description: This class includes aquaculture (including mariculture) producing fish, crustaceans, molluscs, other aquatic animals and plants in seawater, including operation of hatcheries and fish farms in salt-water-filled tanks or reservoirs, in enclosed sections of the sea, or in saltwater ponds.
includes: culture of finfish in sea water
culture of bivalves (oysters, mussels, etc.), lobsters, shrimps, fry of crustaceans, larvae of bivalves
culture of seaweeds and other edible marine algae
culture of crustaceans, bivalves, other molluscs and other aquatic animals in sea water
aquaculture in brackish water, in salt-water-filled tanks or reservoirs
excludes: operation of sport fishing preserves, see 9319
fishing preserves and angling activities, see 9319
